title: Interpretation of servitude.
doc_html:
Art. 730.  Interpretation of servitude.

Doubt as to the existence, extent, or manner of exercise of a predial servitude shall be resolved in favor of the servient estate.

Acts 1977, No. 514, §1.
doc_text:
Art. 730.  Interpretation of servitude.
Doubt as to the existence, extent, or manner of exercise of a predial servitude shall be resolved in favor of the servient estate.
Acts 1977, No. 514, §1.
